label_verbatim: (Name of Limited Liability Partnership in Jurisdiction of Organization)
rationale: LLP's legal name in its home jurisdiction. Same key family as MLLP-12 / MLLC-12 / MLPA-12B (entity-name-vs-home-jurisdiction convention).

label_verbatim: FIRST: If different, the name under which the limited liability partnership applied for authority to do business in the State of Maine pursuant to 31 MRSA §853.1.A or 31 MRSA §852.2.B is
rationale: Maine name used at qualification when different from the home name. The form text cites BOTH §853.1.A (general foreign-qualification fictitious-name provision) AND §852.2.B (assumed-name-for-suffix); MLLP-12 (qualification) splits these into two separate widgets (entity.maine_assumed_name_for_suffix and entity.maine_fictitious_name). MLLP-12B collapses both into one widget. Mapped to the more general fictitious-name key — synth/rubric must accept the value regardless of which §852.2.B vs §853.1.A path produced it. See open_question.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The jurisdiction of its organization is
rationale: State or country of formation. Same key as MLLP-12 / MLPA-12B.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The date on which it was authorized to do business in the State of Maine is
rationale: Date the foreign LLP was originally authorized in Maine. Same key as MLPA-12B / FICT-4 / CLKRA-3.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: The address of the principal or registered office of the limited liability partnership, wherever located, is (street, city, state and zip)
rationale: Single-line physical address of the principal/registered office (wherever located). Same key family as MLLC-12 / MLPA-12B / MLLP-12-1.

label_verbatim: Authorized Signature(s)* / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Individual-signer printed name and capacity (Shape D — combined widget). Same shape as MLLP-12 / MLLP-17.

label_verbatim: For Authorized Signature(s) on behalf of Entities: Name of Entity
rationale: Name of the entity signing on behalf of the LLP. Established canonical key (MLLP-12, MLLP-17, MLLP-17A, MLLP-9). Note: drafter proposed `filing.signer_entity.name` which is non-canonical — corrected here.

label_verbatim: For Authorized Signature(s) on behalf of Entities: By (authorized signature) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Printed name and capacity of the natural person signing for the entity signer. Established canonical key (parallels filing.signer.entity_name above; same family on MLLP-12 / MLLP-17). Drafter's `filing.signer_entity.signer_printed_name_and_capacity` corrected here.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total fees (base $90 per page-0 header plus expedite premium).
